prestazioni: Upgrade to a bespoke **M-Sport (BMW M GmbH) hybrid turbocharger system** for the **6.0L W12 TSI (CBJ/CBJB) engine**, featuring twin **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and 106mm exducers, paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons** (9.5:1 compression) and **Carrillo H-beam connecting rods** to handle 1,000+ Nm of torque. Includes a **custom 4.5-inch titanium downpipe** with **Akrapovič 304 stainless steel headers** and a **Motec M150 ECU** with flex-fuel mapping for E85 compatibility.

Installation of a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** with **Bosch Motorsport 2,000cc high-flow injectors** and a **Radium Engineering dual-catch can system** to manage crankcase pressure under extreme boost (target: 2.2 bar). Pair with a **Drexler Motorsport limited-slip differential (LSD)** with 45% lockup and **AP Racing 6-piston calipers** clamping **380mm carbon-ceramic rotors** for sustained high-speed braking.

Full **KW Automotive Clubsport coilover suspension** with **3-way adjustable damping**, **Eibach Motorsport progressive-rate springs** (25% stiffer than OEM), and **Bentley-specific spherical bearing control arms** from **H&R Motorsport**. Includes a **custom front sway bar** (28mm hollow) and **rear sway bar** (25mm solid) from **Hotchkis Motorsport** to reduce body roll by 40% during high-G cornering.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** for the Flying Spur Speed, featuring **carbon fiber fender flares** (3.5-inch wider front, 4-inch wider rear) with **custom LED side markers** integrated into the lower bumper. Includes a **full carbon fiber front splitter** with **active aerodynamic Gurney flaps** (adjustable via Bentley’s Dynamic Ride system) and a **fixed rear diffuser** with **titanium exhaust tips** from **Fi Exhaust**.

**Vorsteiner V-FF107 forged carbon fiber wheels** (22x10.5 front, 22x12.5 rear) with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires** (285/30R22 front, 325/25R22 rear). Wheel spacers: **H&R TRAK+ 15mm hubcentric spacers** to fill the widened arches. **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers** painted **Bentley Racing Green** with **gold anodized pistons** for visual contrast.

**Full custom interior by Saddleback Leather**, featuring **quilted Alcantara headliner** with **Bentley Speed stitching**, **carbon fiber door cards** with **aluminum inlays**, and **Recaro Pole Position seats** (retaining OEM heating/cooling) wrapped in **Bridge of Weir leather** with **embroidered Flying Spur Speed logos**. Includes a **custom roll cage** (MIG-welded 4130 chromoly) with **aluminum footplates** and **carbon fiber door bars** for chassis rigidity.
